ideas.name: git-identity
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: A declarative configuration tool that reads the Vehir broker for email and signing key settings, then applies them to the local git repository using git config --local, supporting named identity profiles.

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: JSON output formatting for structured git identity results

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Reads configuration via broker for email and signing key settings

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Runtime C library providing standard system interfaces
